---
title: "News"
listing:
  contents: "blog/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
---

## Applying

I am always interested in interacting with smart students for any project, possibly leading to doing a PhD at USC. Please feel free to [email me](mailto:julieneg@usc.edu). Before you do, please make sure to read [this blog post](https://strangeweather.wordpress.com/2018/01/04/friendly-advice-to-graduate-school-applicants/).

## External Writing

These days I mostly write about  open science at [CyberPaleo](https://medium.com/cyberpaleo)

## USC Climate Dynamics news
